trust.subtitle: We believe trust is the foundation of any successful job, which is why safety is at the heart of everything we do.

dispute.title: Dispute Resolution
dispute.desc: Our team is always available to intervene if there is any misunderstanding between parties.

faq.title: Have Questions? We Have Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about how the platform works and managing your requests.

items.q: Is the platform free for customers?
items.a: Yes, Secure Marketplace is 100% free for customers to post requests and receive offers. You only pay the service provider directly for the work done.

items.q: How do I pay service providers?
items.a: Payments are negotiated directly between you and the service provider. We recommend discussing payment terms and milestones before starting the project.
Yes, every professional or company on our platform undergoes a manual verification process of their identity and business registration files to ensure safety.

items.q: Can I cancel a request after posting it?
items.a: Absolutely. You can cancel or close your request at any time from your dashboard if you've changed your mind or found a solution elsewhere.

items.q: Is my personal phone number private?
items.a: Yes. Your contact information is never shown publicly. It is only shared with a service provider after you explicitly accept their offer.

help.title: Still Need Help?
help.desc: Our support team is always available to help you with any inquiries regarding the platform.

meta.title: About Us | Leading Marketplace for Verified Services
meta.description: Learn about our mission to connect customers with the best verified professionals. Founded in Syria, now with a global presence in Sweden, the Netherlands, and Germany.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create a seamless, trustworthy environment where customers can find reliable service providers for any task, and where professionals can grow their business through merit across borders.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Founded in 2026 with our first launch in Syria, we have rapidly expanded to become a global marketplace for trusted services. We believe in transparency and quality above all, which is why we proudly operate branches in Sweden, the Netherlands, and Germany today.

meta.title: Contact Us | Get Expert Support & Help
meta.description: Have questions? Our team is here to help. Contact us for support, partnerships, or feedback about our service marketplace.

meta.title: Terms of Service | Secure Service Marketplace
meta.description: Read our terms and conditions for using the Service Marketplace platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Secure Service Marketplace. By using our website and services, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Secure Service Marketplace platform. By accessing our site, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

accounts.title: 2. User Accounts
accounts.content: To access professional features, you must create an account. You represent that all information provided is accurate and that you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials.

requests.title: 3. Service Requests & Offers
requests.content: Customers may post service requests, and Service Providers may submit offers. All contractual agreements are made solely between the Customer and the Service Provider. We provide the marketplace infrastructure but are not a party to individual service contracts.

verification.title: 4. Verification & Trust
verification.content: We verify companies to enhance platform security, but this verification is not a guarantee of future performance. Users should always perform their own due diligence before hiring.

conduct.title: 5. Prohibited Conduct
conduct.content: You agree not to use the platform for fraudulent purposes, harassment, or to distribute malicious software. Posting false reviews or misleading information is strictly prohibited.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Secure Service Marketplace is not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from service quality, payment disputes between parties, or platform downtime.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be announced via the dashboard or email.

contact.title: 8. Contact Information
contact.content: For legal inquiries or clarifications regarding these terms, please contact our support team at support@servicemarket.com.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Your Data Security Matters
meta.description: Learn how we protect your information and respect your privacy on our platform.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect and use your information to provide a secure marketplace experience.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect personal information (name, email, phone) and professional data (business licenses, portfolio) only when necessary to facilitate marketplace operations and verify account authenticity.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: Your data is used to match customers with providers, improve platform security, and send essential service updates.
points: Connecting customers with the right service professionals
Verification of business credentials and identity
Sending status updates for requests and offers
Analyzing platform performance to improve user experience

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We only share your contact details and project requirements with the counterparties you interact with on the platform. We never sell your personal information to advertisers.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies & Analytics
cookies.content: We use essential cookies to maintain your login session and anonymous analytics to understand how users interact with our site.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We employ industry-standard encryption and security protocols to protect your data from unauthorized access or disclosure.

rights.title: 6. Your Data Rights
rights.content: You can access, update, or request deletion of your account and associated data through your profile settings or by contacting support.

updates.title: 7. Policy Updates
updates.content: Significant changes to this policy will be communicated through our platform or via email notification.

meta.title: FAQ - Service Marketplace
meta.description: Frequently Asked Questions about our secure service marketplace.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using our platform during our free launch period.

q1.question: How does Service Marketplace work?
q1.answer: Post your service needs—from AC repair to design work. Verified companies will view your request and send you offers. You compare profiles, reviews, and prices to pick the perfect pro.

q2.question: Is it really free during the launch?
q2.answer: Yes! For a limited time, the platform is 100% free for both customers and service providers. No hidden fees, no subscriptions—just quality connections.

q3.question: How do I know companies are verified?
q3.answer: We manually check business licenses and identity for every provider. Look for the 'Verified' badge on company profiles for extra peace of mind.

q4.question: What if I can't find a specific service?
q4.answer: We're expanding fast! If you don't see your category, choose 'Other' and describe your needs. We'll help find someone who can help.

q5.question: How do I post a service request?
q5.answer: Click 'Post a Project', fill in the details of the work you need done, and hit submit. You'll start receiving offers from professionals within minutes.

q6.question: Can I choose which provider to hire?
q6.answer: Absolutely. You are in full control. Compare the offers you receive, look at the company's past reviews, and message them directly before deciding.

q7.question: How do I register my company?
q7.answer: Click 'Provide Services' and fill out your business profile. Our team will review your credentials and verify your account so you can start bidding on projects.

q8.question: What are the benefits of verification?
q8.answer: Verified companies get a special badge, rank higher in search results, and build more trust with potential clients, leading to more projects.

q9.question: Is my data safe on the platform?
q9.answer: We use industry-standard encryption and never share your private contact information until you choose to interact with a specific user or company.

q10.question: How can I leave a review?
q10.answer: After a project is completed, both parties can leave a rating and review. This peer-review system ensures accountability and high service quality.

faq.contactSupport: Our support team is ready to help you with anything you need.

membership.heading: Everything is Free!
membership.subheading: We're launching with full access at no cost for all users and service providers.
membership.description: Enjoy all platform features for free during our launch period. Paid plans may be introduced in the future — and early members will always get the best deal.
